name: Profunda - Search Grants (Firecrawl) - PROD v5 (Expanded + Filtered)

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', temperature: 0, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a CLASSIFIER and EXTRACTOR. You do NOT search or use outside knowledge. You analyze ONLY the provided web page snippets and extract real grant opportunities, funding programs, RFPs, or RFAs relevant to digital equity, technology access, broadband, community development, or nonprofit capacity building.

Rules:
- ONLY extract actual funding opportunities with a funder or program name
- NEVER extract grant writing courses, templates, or educational content about grants
- Include deadline/date information if mentioned in the snippet
- Include funding amount if mentioned
- Include geographic focus/eligibility if mentioned
- If no qualifying grants can be extracted, return {"grants":[]}
- Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no commentary.

Output schema:
{"grants":[{"name":string,"funder":string|null,"description":string|null,"amount":string|null,"deadline":string|null,"geography":string|null,"eligibility":string|null,"url":string|null,"confidence":number(0-1)|null}]}' }, { role: 'user', content: $('Build Search Context').first().json.search_context }] }) }}
={{ { run_id: $('Normalize Input').first().json.run_id, status: 'failed', error_message: String($json?.error?.message || 'Unknown error') } }}
